reason: Branch-wide design-gate coverage. This branch bundles many changes across several sessions, and the gate requires a single set to cover every changed UI-path file. The genuinely visual changes keep their own design evidence: overflow layouts in design/mockups/wheel-overflow, the group-delete safety dialog in design/mockups/group-delete-safety (APPROVED), and the add-while-open tile arrival in design/mockups/add-while-open (APPROVED). Every other UI-path file listed here is a non-visual edit — reliability, performance, error-handling, DPI/units, accessibility metadata (AutomationProperties.Name), behavior-preserving refactors, and folder documentation — that does not change the visual design. This waiver consolidates gate coverage for the whole branch.
approvedBy: Ivan Larin (repo owner) via chat request on 2026-07-11
